title: HM Chief Inspector of Prisons annual report: 2024 to 2025
body: "The annual report of HM Chief Inspector of Prisons, drawing on 83 individual reports of inspections and independent review of progress visits to prisons, young offender institutions, secure training centres, immigration detention, court custody and other custodial establishments, and thematic reports, published between 1 April 2024 and 31 March 2025. "
